ab: masadakay kako aci ina a misalama anini.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: sa langdaw sa ko kakarayan to romo’ad, cowa kafa^det cowa kasi^naw, saemelay ko falifali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: i rengorengosan kami a komaen to ^pang, mapaedil no cidal ko tatirengan, tada dihekoay.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: herek no lahok, masakahengangay to ko kakarayan.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: licay han ako ci ina, mana kahengang ko kakarayan.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: sowal sa ci ina, wa aira ko faliyos a tayni alatek.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: awaay ko to’em/kadit i kakarayan, masadakay to ko fo’is.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: i fatad no pinokayan a lalan, ira ko pinanay no faloco’ ako to fo’is.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: nanay aka ho katayni koni a faliyos, sakasadakan nanay ho kako a misalama.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
